decision: Localhost web app first (Python stdlib http.server, zero pip installs), Electron/Tauri deferred to Phase 2+ per the reasoning in this thread.
real_endpoint_tests_run_this_session: POST /api/registry/attest valid -> SAVED, receipt written, file updated
POST /api/registry/attest invalid model_policy -> REJECTED, file untouched
POST /api/registry/attest injection attempt in workflow_id -> REJECTED before reaching subprocess
POST /api/validate -> real checker ran, full aggregated report returned
POST /api/sync -> real noos_integrator_sync_v1.py ran, honest summary returned
bug_found_and_fixed_during_real_verifica: control-desk/README.md documents 'gpt-5.4' and 'auto-scrape' as descriptive examples, tripping the same self-reference class of false positive seen twice before in this project. Fixed by adding control-desk/** to the checker's exclude_globs. Re-ran full suite after fix: 9/9 negative tests still pass, self-scan back to exactly 23 violations (all RCP5_audit_staleness), zero new false positives - confirmed via unique rule_ids in JSON, not eyeballed console output.
test_attestation_reverted: During endpoint testing, ssot_agentic_ci was attested for real (to prove the write path works) then explicitly reverted back to last_audited=TODO before packaging - this delivery ships with the honest, fully-unaudited 23-entry registry.
explicitly_not_built: Open PR / git branch+commit automation - Submit Queue reports real git status only
Home/cloud mirror sync - reports 'unconfigured' honestly rather than faking freshness
Copilot UI auto-scrape bridge (Phase 4) - attestation is manual-entry by design for now
Electron/Tauri wrapper - deferred per Phase 1/2 decision
